attachment_reviews.note: Contract reference reviewed locally for demo workflow. Supplier relationship, scope, amount, and authorization context require human institutional review. No PDF parsing, OCR, legal interpretation, or compliance conclusion performed.

reviewed_findings_snapshot.title: Large expense review
reviewed_findings_snapshot.supplier_name: QuickBuild Technical Services Sp. z o.o.
reviewed_findings_snapshot.detected_signal: Expense GE-002 amount 24000.00 PLN meets or exceeds the large expense threshold 10000.00.
reviewed_findings_snapshot.reviewer_question: Is this large expense supported by contract, invoice, activity evidence, and budget justification?
reviewed_findings_snapshot.next_action: Review supporting documents before accepting the expense.

rule_trace.human_readable_rule: A large grant expense requires human review when the amount is material enough to warrant additional budget, activity, supplier, and documentation checks.
rule_trace.verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only and does not create a donor compliance verdict, fraud finding, legal conclusion, payment block, supplier sanction, or autonomous enforcement action.

normative_trace.verdict_boundary: LEO identifies potentially relevant normative references and review requirements only. LEO does not issue legal conclusions, donor compliance conclusions, payment decisions, supplier sanctions, or enforcement conclusions.

human_review.note: Large expense requires management/accounting review. Supporting contract, invoice, activity evidence, and budget justification should be checked before institutional acceptance.

reviewed_findings_snapshot.title: Cash reimbursement documentation review
reviewed_findings_snapshot.detected_signal: Expense GE-005 uses cash reimbursement with document_status 'partial'. Budget line cash permission: True.
reviewed_findings_snapshot.reviewer_question: Is the reimbursement supported by complete participant, recipient, or payment documentation?
reviewed_findings_snapshot.next_action: Review reimbursement documentation before accepting the expense.

rule_trace.human_readable_rule: A cash reimbursement requires human review when supporting documentation, activity linkage, or reimbursement justification must be checked before audit packaging.
rule_trace.verdict_boundary: This rule creates a human review requirement only and does not create a donor compliance verdict, fraud finding, legal conclusion, payment block, supplier sanction, or autonomous enforcement action.

reviewed_findings_snapshot.title: Missing activity reference
reviewed_findings_snapshot.detected_signal: Expense GE-008 has no activity_reference, but its budget line requires a link to an activity or output.
reviewed_findings_snapshot.reviewer_question: Which project activity, output, or deliverable does this expense support?
reviewed_findings_snapshot.next_action: Request activity or output reference before accepting the expense for reporting.

rule_trace.human_readable_rule: A grant expense requires human review when it lacks an activity reference needed to connect the cost to a project activity, output, or implementation record.

evidence_attachment_export_boundary.statement: Evidence attachments are exported as local reference metadata only. The package does not embed, open, parse, OCR, summarize, sign, transmit, or validate attached documents.
